item.name: Deinonychus Horn
item.description: This horn of bone emits a primitive sound that summons forth your deinonychus to outwit your prey.

mount.name: Deinonychus
mount.action: Summon forth your deinonychus. Cleverer than the average prehistoric carnivore.
mount.description: Native to the southern regions of Ilsabard, the deinonychus is cousin to the raptors that inhabit the Twelveswood. Possessed of superior intelligence, as seen in its habit of hunting in pairs, the beasts have been employed in warfare since antiquity.
